summary: Checked-in literature workflow authority pack: package-local recipes + session protocol resolved through `nullius workflow-plan`, with mixed provider maturity and some still-bounded HEP-backed steps beneath the workflow layer.

install.claude_code: Consume the checked-in package-local recipes and session protocol through `nullius workflow-plan` or direct package-level resolver imports; do not recreate workflow-pack authority inside provider-specific MCP facades, and do not assume every bounded step already has provider-parity beneath the workflow layer.
install.codex: Consume the checked-in package-local recipes and session protocol through `nullius workflow-plan` or direct package-level resolver imports; keep workflow authority above atomic MCP tools, and treat some bounded steps as still backed by current HEP maturity seams.
install.opencode: Consume the checked-in package-local recipes and session protocol through `nullius workflow-plan` or direct package-level resolver imports; keep workflow authority in the workflow-pack layer, while recognizing that some bounded steps still depend on current HEP-backed provider maturity.
